fixtures.name: plate_plain
fixtures.description: Baseline plain plate with no cutouts.

fixtures.name: plate_plain_chamfered_edges
fixtures.description: Plain plate with a uniform edge chamfer that breaks the side boundary planes while preserving the overall plate envelope.

fixtures.name: plate_plain_rotated_z30
fixtures.description: Plain plate rotated about Z to baseline non-axis-aligned behavior.

fixtures.name: plate_linear_two_holes
fixtures.description: Simple two-hole plate used as the baseline linear pattern case.

fixtures.name: plate_grid_two_by_three
fixtures.description: Rectangular 2x3 hole grid for nested loop emission coverage.

fixtures.name: plate_single_slot
fixtures.description: Single rounded slot in a compact plate.

fixtures.name: plate_rectangular_through_cutout
fixtures.description: Plate with one axis-aligned rectangular through-cutout sized for conservative cuboid difference reconstruction.

fixtures.name: plate_rectangular_top_pocket
fixtures.description: Plate with one shallow rectangular top pocket to exercise blind-cuboid subtraction detection.

fixtures.name: plate_single_counterbore
fixtures.description: One stepped counterbore hole in a thicker plate.

fixtures.name: plate_counterbore_depth_near_thickness
fixtures.description: Counterbore depth is close to plate thickness without becoming a blind through-profile.

fixtures.name: plate_counterbore_small_clearance
fixtures.description: Counterbore with very small radial clearance to the outer plate boundary.

fixtures.name: plate_mixed_linear_and_slot
fixtures.description: Mixed-feature plate with both repeated holes and a rounded slot.

fixtures.name: plate_multi_pattern_mixed_edge
fixtures.description: Mixed plate combining a 3-hole linear pattern, a 2x3 grid pattern, and a slot on a single wide plate — exercises the detector handling multiple concurrent feature families.

fixtures.name: plate_near_boundary_linear
fixtures.description: Linear hole pair placed near the outer plate boundary without crossing it.

fixtures.name: plate_long_aspect_linear
fixtures.description: High-aspect-ratio plate with a three-hole linear pattern.

fixtures.name: plate_small_hole_grid
fixtures.description: Small-diameter hole grid to exercise detector scale tolerance.

fixtures.name: plate_large_hole_pair
fixtures.description: Large-diameter hole pair to exercise detector radius limits.

fixtures.name: plate_thick
fixtures.description: Thick plate with thin_ratio of 0.20, validating detection in the 0.18–0.25 band unlocked by plate_thin_ratio_max=0.25.

fixtures.name: plate_plain_filleted_edges
fixtures.description: Plain plate with uniform vertical-edge fillet (rounded corners) that breaks strict side-boundary-plane coverage while preserving the flat top/bottom faces.

fixtures.name: plate_filleted_linear_holes
fixtures.description: Filleted-edge plate with a two-hole linear pattern, combining edge fillet with repeated holes on a single plate.

fixtures.name: box_z_through_hole
fixtures.description: Centered box with one through-hole along the z axis.

fixtures.name: box_x_through_hole
fixtures.description: Centered box with one through-hole along the x axis.

fixtures.name: box_rounded_edges
fixtures.description: Rounded-edge box with moderate fillets that preserve the axis-aligned cuboid envelope while reducing strict boundary-plane area.

fixtures.name: box_plain_rotated_z25
fixtures.description: Plain rotated box (no holes) to verify rotated-box detection — the simplest positive rotated-box case.

fixtures.name: box_z_through_hole_rotated_z25
fixtures.description: Non-axis-aligned rotated box to baseline that rotated non-plate geometry is not mistakenly detected as box_like_solid.

fixtures.name: box_rotated_z25_with_hole
fixtures.description: Rotated box (Z25 deg) with a single through-hole on the smallest face. Validates rotated-box local-frame hole detection.

fixtures.name: l_bracket_plain
fixtures.description: Plain L-bracket baseline: L-shaped cross-section extruded along Y; positive for linear_extrude_solid.

fixtures.name: negative_sphere
fixtures.description: Sphere geometry as negative-class fixture to guard against over-detection.

fixtures.name: negative_torus
fixtures.description: Torus geometry as negative-class fixture to guard against over-detection.

fixtures.name: box_with_top_notch
fixtures.description: Box with a rectangular notch cut from the top face. The detector should preserve the box_like_solid base while also recovering the blind rectangular pocket volume.

fixtures.name: box_rounded_edges_with_top_notch
fixtures.description: Rounded-edge box with a top-face notch. The detector should preserve a tolerant box_like_solid base while also recovering the blind rectangular pocket volume.

fixtures.name: box_hollow_ambiguous
fixtures.description: Hollow box with interior cavity - can be interpreted as single hollow box OR as six separate wall plates

fixtures.name: cylinder_plain
fixtures.description: Baseline solid cylinder along z-axis. Guards against false classification as plate or box.

fixtures.name: cylinder_short_disk
fixtures.description: Short wide cylinder (disk form factor) to stress the plate/cylinder boundary.

fixtures.name: cylinder_x_axis
fixtures.description: Solid cylinder along x-axis to exercise non-z cylinder detection.

fixtures.name: plate_plain_rotated_x30
fixtures.description: Plain plate tilted 30° around the X axis. Guards against false axis-aligned plate detection and validates the rotated-plate detector.

fixtures.name: plate_rotated_z30_with_hole
fixtures.description: Plate rotated 30° around Z with a single through-hole. Validates rotated-plate local-frame cutout detection for Z-axis rotation.

fixtures.name: plate_rotated_x30_with_two_holes
fixtures.description: Plate rotated 30° around X with two through-holes in a linear pattern. Validates rotated-plate local-frame cutout detection for non-Z-axis rotation.

fixtures.name: plate_rotated_z30_with_slot
fixtures.description: Plate rotated 30° around Z with a single slot. Validates rotated-plate local-frame slot detection.

fixtures.name: plate_rotated_z30_with_linear_pattern
fixtures.description: Plate rotated 30° around Z with three equally-spaced holes forming a linear pattern. Validates rotated-plate local-frame pattern detection.

fixtures.name: revolve_rectangle_profile
fixtures.description: Rectangle profile revolved around Z; Phase 2 → cylinder primitive upgrade.

fixtures.name: revolve_triangle_profile
fixtures.description: Triangle profile revolved around Z; Phase 2 → cone primitive upgrade.

fixtures.name: revolve_semicircle_profile
fixtures.description: Semicircle-like profile revolved around Z; Phase 2 → sphere primitive upgrade.

fixtures.name: revolve_christmas_tree
fixtures.description: Sawtooth tree profile that should emit one compact rotate_extrude polygon.

fixtures.name: revolve_vase
fixtures.description: Vase-like radius profile for generic polygon revolve recovery.

fixtures.name: revolve_stepped_shaft
fixtures.description: Stepped shaft profile for generic polygon revolve recovery.

fixtures.name: non_revolve_cube
fixtures.description: Unit cube. Balanced inertia tensor edge-case; must be rejected.

fixtures.name: non_revolve_square_prism
fixtures.description: Square cross-section extruded along Z; cross-slice radial profiles differ by angle.

fixtures.name: non_revolve_symmetric_composite
fixtures.description: Plate with mirrored bosses; symmetric but not a revolve.

fixtures.name: non_revolve_shaft_with_keyway
fixtures.description: Near-axisymmetric shaft with one axial keyway slot.

fixtures.name: negative_cone
fixtures.description: Cone geometry as negative-class fixture to guard against cylinder over-detection.

fixtures.name: negative_hex_prism
fixtures.description: Hexagonal prism: negative-class for cylinder over-detection, positive-class for linear_extrude_solid (Phase 3).

fixtures.name: revolve_annular_tube
fixtures.description: Annular tube (inner r=3, outer r=6, height=10) revolved around Z; Phase 1.6 annular revolve.

fixtures.name: plate_single_hole
fixtures.description: Single centered hole in a plain plate. Simplest positive hole detection case.

fixtures.name: plate_two_slots
fixtures.description: Two parallel Y-direction slots on a plate. Tests multi-slot counting.

fixtures.name: plate_4x4_grid
fixtures.description: Dense 4x4 hole grid to exercise nested-loop emission and large hole counts.

fixtures.name: plate_3x3_grid
fixtures.description: 3x3 hole grid with slightly larger diameter to vary the grid geometry.

fixtures.name: plate_counterbore_pair
fixtures.description: Two side-by-side counterbore holes in a thick plate.

fixtures.name: plate_chamfered_with_hole
fixtures.description: Chamfered-edge plate with a single centered hole. Combines chamfer and hole detection.

fixtures.name: plate_filleted_grid_holes
fixtures.description: Filleted-edge plate with a 2x2 hole grid. Combines edge fillet with grid detection.

fixtures.name: plate_two_rectangular_pockets
fixtures.description: Two symmetrically placed rectangular blind pockets in a thick plate.

fixtures.name: plate_cutout_and_hole
fixtures.description: Plate with one rectangular through-cutout and one separate round hole.

fixtures.name: plate_square
fixtures.description: Square-aspect-ratio plate (20x20x2) with one centered hole. Tests non-elongated plate detection.

fixtures.name: plate_three_holes
fixtures.description: Three irregularly spaced holes (no pattern) to test hole counting without forcing a linear pattern.

fixtures.name: plate_slot_pair
fixtures.description: Two parallel X-direction slots offset in Y. Tests multi-slot counting on a single plate.

fixtures.name: plate_counterbore_and_slot
fixtures.description: One counterbore plus one slot on a single thick plate. Exercises mixed detection.

fixtures.name: plate_rotated_z45_plain
fixtures.description: Plain plate rotated 45 degrees around Z. Extends rotated-plate detection to a steeper angle.

fixtures.name: plate_wide_linear
fixtures.description: Wide plate with a 4-hole linear pattern along X. High-span pattern on a wide footprint.

fixtures.name: box_plain
fixtures.description: Baseline plain box with no holes or cutouts. Simplest positive box_like_solid case.

fixtures.name: box_y_through_hole
fixtures.description: Box with one through-hole along the y axis. Covers y-axis hole case missing from existing suite.

fixtures.name: box_two_z_holes
fixtures.description: Box with two z-axis through-holes offset symmetrically on X. Tests multi-hole counting.

fixtures.name: box_cubic
fixtures.description: Cubic box (15x15x15) to verify unity-aspect-ratio handling without misclassification.

fixtures.name: box_tall_narrow
fixtures.description: Tall narrow box (10x10x30) stressing the plate/box boundary on the tall axis.

fixtures.name: box_small
fixtures.description: Small box (8x6x4 mm) to verify scale invariance of the box_like_solid detector.

fixtures.name: box_rotated_x20
fixtures.description: Plain box rotated 20 degrees around X. Complements existing Z-rotated cases with X-tilt baseline.

fixtures.name: box_large_z_hole
fixtures.description: Box with one large-diameter z-axis through-hole (d=8). Stresses hole-to-face-area ratio.

fixtures.name: box_two_cutouts
fixtures.description: Box with two symmetrically placed top-open rectangular notches. Tests multi-pocket counting.

fixtures.name: l_bracket_tall
fixtures.description: Tall L-bracket (20x8x30 envelope, leg_thickness=3.5). High Z/X aspect ratio variant.

fixtures.name: revolve_y_axis
fixtures.description: Rectangle profile revolved around Y axis; Phase 2 cylinder primitive upgrade.

fixtures.name: revolve_frustum_trapezoid
fixtures.description: Trapezoidal frustum profile revolved around Z; Phase 2 cone primitive upgrade (r1=6, r2=3).

fixtures.name: revolve_inverted_cone
fixtures.description: Frustum (r1=2, r2=5, h=8) revolved around Z; tip-heavy taper; Phase 2 cone upgrade.

fixtures.name: revolve_fat_disk
fixtures.description: Wide low-aspect rectangle profile revolved around Z; Phase 2 cylinder primitive upgrade.

fixtures.name: cylinder_y_axis
fixtures.description: Solid cylinder along y-axis to exercise non-z cylinder detection.

fixtures.name: cylinder_large_diameter
fixtures.description: Large-diameter cylinder (d=50) stressing the cylinder/plate boundary at scale.

fixtures.name: cylinder_narrow_tall
fixtures.description: Narrow tall cylinder (d=8, h=60) for high-aspect-ratio revolve stress testing.

fixtures.name: cone_steep
fixtures.description: Steep cone frustum (r1=15, r2=1, h=25); negative-class guard against cylinder over-detection.

fixtures.name: cone_shallow
fixtures.description: Shallow frustum (r1=8, r2=6, h=10); near-cylinder negative-class guard.

fixtures.name: prism_triangle
fixtures.description: Triangular prism (3 sides); negative for cylinder, positive for linear_extrude_solid.

fixtures.name: prism_pentagon
fixtures.description: Pentagonal prism (5 sides); negative for cylinder, positive for linear_extrude_solid.

fixtures.name: prism_octagon
fixtures.description: Octagonal prism (8 sides); near-cylinder negative guard for cylinder over-detection.

fixtures.name: non_revolve_tall_box
fixtures.description: Tall square-section prism; cross-slice radial profiles vary by angle, must be rejected as revolve.

fixtures.name: non_revolve_flat_symmetric
fixtures.description: Wide flat symmetric composite; symmetric but not a revolve, must be rejected.
